summary: Iteration 90: SmartDock + Customizable Dashboard. All features working correctly. SmartDock renders without background dimming, dock icons open inline panels, dashboard customization with edit mode and pinned shortcuts works, /cosmic-mixer route loads full Cosmic Mixer page with all 5 layers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartDock and Dashboard customization fully tested. Key data-testids: smart-dock, dock-assistant, dock-mixer, dock-frequency, dock-expand, dock-collapse, assistant-panel, frequency-panel, dashboard-edit-btn, edit-mode-banner, add-shortcut-btn, add-shortcuts-sheet, pinned-section, pinned-{shortcut}, edit-section-{id}, cosmic-mixer-page, mixer-freq-{hz}, mixer-sound-{id}, mixer-mantra-{id}, mixer-light-{id}, mixer-vibe-toggle, mixer-volume, mixer-mute, mixer-back, mixer-stop-all.

smartdock_no_dimming.details: SmartDock renders at z-[80] with no full-screen backdrop overlay. Panels open inline without dimming the background.

smartdock_icons.details: Sage (assistant), Mixer, Tones (frequency) icons visible and clickable. Panels open inline.

smartdock_expand_collapse.details: Expand button shows Feedback and Help icons. Collapse button hides them.

dashboard_customize_button.details: Customize button in header toggles edit mode. Shows 'Done' when in edit mode.

dashboard_my_shortcuts.details: 8 default pinned shortcuts: Breathe, Mood, Journal, Meditate, Oracle, Stars, Blessings, Crystals

dashboard_edit_mode.details: Edit mode shows all 9 sections with move up/down arrows and visibility toggle (eye icon)

dashboard_add_shortcuts.details: Add Shortcuts button opens bottom sheet with all actions grouped by category. Tap to pin/unpin.

dashboard_layout_api.details: GET /api/dashboard/layout returns default layout. PUT /api/dashboard/layout saves custom layout.

cosmic_mixer_page.details: /cosmic-mixer route loads full page with 5 layers: Frequency, Sound, Mantra, Light Therapy, Vibration

old_widgets_removed.details: FloatingAssistant, QuickMeditationWidget, CosmicMixer components NOT in App.js. Only SmartDock imported.
